description_long: This object consists of a stack of four shallow, wide bowls with gently curved, organic forms and integrated handles on each side. The bowls are nested perfectly, each one slightly smaller than the one below, creating a tiered effect. The handles are broad and rounded, extending outward in a smooth arc, and each bowl has a low, gently sloping rim. The surface appears matte and smooth, with a uniform light tan or beige color throughout. There are no visible decorative patterns or embellishments, giving the set a minimalist and modern aesthetic. The overall construction suggests the bowls are lightweight and likely made from a molded material such as plastic or melamine.
description: A stack of four wide, shallow, tan bowls with integrated rounded handles and a smooth, matte finish. The design is minimalist and modern, with no visible decoration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stacked bowls with all four sets of handles clearly visible, emphasizing the tiered, nested arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness and curvature of the bowls, with the handles extending outward and the stack's layered profile visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open, concave interiors of the bowls and the symmetrical arrangement of the handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same layered profile as view 1, with the handles extending outward and the smooth, rounded edges.
attribute_context_of_use: serving or holding food items, such as snacks or fruit
